title: Medici family mystery may be solved after more than 400 years
summary: 一项新的DNA研究可能解开了美第奇家族长达400多年的谜团，发现疟疾可能是导致该家族多名成员死亡的原因。这项研究通过分析美第奇家族成员的遗骸，揭示了历史上神秘死亡背后的疾病因素。
summary_en: A new DNA study may solve the 400-year-old mystery of the Medici family, suggesting malaria as the cause of death for several members. The research analyzed remains to uncover the disease behind historical unexplained deaths.
